sync.title: Settings
sync.disconnectHubWarning: Pipette Hub will also be disconnected.
sync.changePasswordInfo: All synced data will be re-encrypted with the new password.
sync.samePassword: New password must be different from the current password.
sync.changePasswordUndecryptable: Some files cannot be decrypted. Please scan and delete undecryptable files first.
sync.resetConfirm: This will delete all synced data from Google Drive appDataFolder. This action cannot be undone.
sync.resetTargetsConfirm: The selected data will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
sync.resetLocalTargetsConfirm: The selected local data will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

readiness.unauthenticated: Sign in to Google to sync.
readiness.noPasswordFile: Set a sync password to start syncing.
readiness.decryptFailed: Stored password could not be read (the OS keychain may have changed).
readiness.keystoreUnavailable: OS keychain is not available on this system.
readiness.remoteCheckFailed: Couldn't reach Google Drive — sync is paused.

changePasswordError.unauthenticated: Please sign in to Google before changing the password.
changePasswordError.noPasswordFile: No saved password to change. Set a password first.
changePasswordError.decryptFailed: Couldn't read the existing password (OS keychain rejected it).
changePasswordError.keystoreUnavailable: OS keychain is not available; password cannot be changed here.
changePasswordError.remoteCheckFailed: Couldn't reach Google Drive to verify the current password.

sync.changePasswordInProgress: Cannot change password while sync is in progress.
sync.resetLocalConfirm: This will delete all saved layouts and favorites on this device. This action cannot be undone.
sync.passwordMismatch: Sync password does not match. Please check your encryption password.
sync.scanRemoteDesc: Scan remote data to see what is stored in Google Drive.
sync.deleteUndecryptableConfirm: The selected files will be permanently deleted from Google Drive. This action cannot be undone.
sync.existingPasswordHint: A sync password already exists. Enter the same password used on your other device.
sync.unavailable: Unable to connect to sync server. Sync features are currently disabled.

analyze.noData: No data for the selected period.
analyze.selectKeyboard: Select a keyboard from the list.

appUsage.title: App Usage Distribution
appUsage.empty: No app data — turn on Monitor App and start REC to populate this chart.

wpmByApp.title: WPM by App
wpmByApp.empty: No app-tagged minutes yet — turn on Monitor App and start REC to populate this chart.

splitView.narrowWindow: Window too narrow for split view — resize wider to enable.

export.snapshotMissing: Heatmap, Ergonomics, and Layout Comparison need a keymap snapshot to export and are unavailable for this range.

wpm.description:
WPM — Words per minute
Keystrokes divided by 5, per minute of active typing.

summary.label: WPM summary
summary.overallBksPercentDesc: Share of keystrokes that were Backspace.

errorProxy.description:
Bksp % — Share of keystrokes that were Backspace.
Sourced from the keystroke event stream, including all typing not just typing tests.

summary.label: Time-of-day WPM summary
summary.lowestHourDesc: Hour with the lowest WPM (excluding hours with no activity).
summary.activeHoursDesc: Number of hours with at least one keystroke (out of 24).

description.min: Min — Shortest keystroke interval recorded within any minute (fastest single moment).
description.p25:
p25 — Lower quartile
Daily average of each minute's p25; 1/4 of intervals are shorter.
description.p50:
Median — Daily average of each minute's median
Half of intervals are shorter.
description.p75:
p75 — Upper quartile
Daily average of each minute's p75; 3/4 of intervals are shorter.
description.max: Max — Longest keystroke interval recorded within any minute (longest pause).

summary.label: Typing rhythm summary
summary.pauseDesc: Share of intervals of 2s or longer.

activity.legendLowDesc: No keystrokes recorded in this cell.
activity.legendHighDesc:
Peak ({{count}} $t(analyze.unit.keys)).
Cell opacity scales linearly from 0 to this value.
activity.legendHighDescWpm:
Peak WPM ({{wpm}} WPM).
Cell opacity scales linearly to this value.
Desaturated cells did not meet the Min sample threshold.
activity.legendScaleDesc: Linear opacity scale from 0 (empty) to the peak.

summary.label: Activity summary
summary.mostFrequentDowDesc: Day of week with the most keystrokes.
summary.peakCellDesc: Cell (hour × day-of-week) with the most keystrokes.
summary.activeCellsDesc: Cells with at least one keystroke (out of 168).

summary.label: Activity WPM summary
summary.peakCellDesc: Cell (hour × day-of-week) with the highest WPM.
summary.lowestCellDesc: Cell (hour × day-of-week) with the lowest WPM (active cells only).
summary.activeCellsDesc: Cells with at least one keystroke (out of 168).

profile.speedDesc: Window-wide WPM bucketed into Slow (<30) / Medium (30–50) / Fast (≥50). Needs a few days of typing to settle.
profile.handBalanceDesc: Share of bigram keystrokes that landed on each hand. Within ±5% of 50/50 reads as balanced.
profile.sfbDesc: Share of bigrams typed with the same finger. Lower is easier on the hand. <4% Low, 4–8% Medium, ≥8% High.
profile.fatigueDesc: WPM gap between your peak hour and your slowest hour over the window. Wider gap = greater fatigue risk.

bigrams.empty: No bigram data in this range yet. Record some typing and try again.
bigrams.error: Failed to load bigram data. Try again or check the logs.

fingerIki.noSnapshot: Finger interval needs a keymap snapshot. Start a record session or pick a range with one.

keyHeatmap.noLayout: Layout data not available for this snapshot.
keyHeatmap.noSnapshot: No keymap snapshot recorded for this range. Start a record session to capture one.

ranking.emptyFrequentUsed: No key presses in this range.

ergonomics.noSnapshot: No keymap snapshot recorded for this range. Start a record session to capture one.
ergonomics.noLayout: Layout data not available for this snapshot.
ergonomics.noData: No keystrokes recorded in this range.

learning.noData: Not enough matrix activity in this range. Type more or widen the period filter.
learning.relativeTrendNote: Scores are a relative trend, not a calibrated absolute. Watch the line move over time rather than reading the percentage as a grade.

layoutComparison.noTarget: Pick a layout to compare against your typing.
layoutComparison.noSnapshot: No keymap snapshot recorded for this range. Start a record session to capture one.
layoutComparison.noData: No matrix activity recorded in this range.
layoutComparison.fetchError: Failed to compute the layout comparison.
layoutComparison.skipWarning: {{percent}}% of events couldn't map onto this layout. Treat the metrics below as approximate.

layer.title: Keystrokes per layer
layer.noData: No layer activity recorded in this range.
layer.noActivations: No layer-op keys pressed in this range.
layer.requiresSnapshot: Layer activations need a keymap snapshot. Start a record session in this range to capture one.

fingerAssignment.title: Finger assignment
fingerAssignment.subtitle: Click a key to override the estimated finger.
fingerAssignment.noSnapshot: No keymap snapshot available for this range.

peak.longestSessionDesc: Longest continuous typing run, separated by 5+ minutes of idle.

streakGoal.ariaLabel: Goal streak and daily keystroke goal summary
streakGoal.currentStreakDesc:
Days completed in the current cycle
Resets after reaching the target days

dataModal.title: Data
dataModal.deleteKeyboardConfirm: Delete all data for this keyboard?
dataModal.importExportDesc: Import/Export all local data (keyboards, favorites, settings)
dataModal.deleteAllConfirm: This will delete all data including synced data.
dataModal.syncNoOrphans: All synced data is available locally

typing.title: Typing
typing.noItems: No typing data for this keyboard
typing.confirmDeleteSelected: Delete {{count}} day(s) of this device's records? Synced copies will drop too, days recorded by other devices remain. Once deleted, those dates can no longer be re-imported — export first if you need a backup.
typing.confirmDeleteAll: Delete every day this device recorded for this keyboard? Synced copies will drop too, days recorded by other devices remain. Once deleted, those dates can no longer be re-imported — export first if you need a backup.

reason.invalid-filename: filename does not match the export pattern
reason.live-day-locked: this day's file is currently being recorded — unlocks at {{unlock}}
reason.duplicate-in-batch: another file in this batch already targeted the same day
reason.no-matching-target: no local or cloud copy of this day to overwrite
reason.empty-or-invalid-content: file is empty or contains invalid lines
reason.rows-outside-day-window: row timestamps fall outside the day the filename claims

typing.noRemoteDevices: No other devices have typed on this keyboard

hub.displayNameDescription: Your display name on Hub posts
hub.displayNameTaken: This display name is already taken
hub.needsDisplayName: Set a display name in Settings to upload
hub.authDisplayNameConflict: Your Google account name conflicts with an existing display name. Please choose a different display name to continue.

qmkSettings.swap_caps_lock_and_left_control: Caps Lock と左 Control を入れ替える
qmkSettings.treat_caps_lock_as_control: Caps Lock を Control として扱う
qmkSettings.swap_left_alt_and_gui: 左 Alt と GUI (Win/Mac) キーを入れ替える
qmkSettings.swap_right_alt_and_gui: 右 Alt と GUI キーを入れ替える
qmkSettings.disable_the_gui_keys: GUI キーを無効にする
qmkSettings.swap_`_and_escape: ` (バッククォート) と Escape を入れ替える
qmkSettings.swap_\\_and_backspace: \ (バックスラッシュ) と Backspace を入れ替える
qmkSettings.enable_n-key_rollover: Nキーロールオーバー (NKRO) を有効にする
qmkSettings.swap_left_control_and_gui: 左 Control と GUI キーを入れ替える
qmkSettings.swap_right_control_and_gui: 右 Control と GUI キーを入れ替える
qmkSettings.always_send_escape_if_alt_is_pressed: Alt を押している場合は常に Escape を送信する
qmkSettings.always_send_escape_if_control_is_pressed: Control を押している場合は常に Escape を送信する
qmkSettings.always_send_escape_if_gui_is_pressed: GUI を押している場合は常に Escape を送信する
qmkSettings.always_send_escape_if_shift_is_pressed: Shift を押している場合は常に Escape を送信する
qmkSettings.tapping_term: タッピング判定時間 (Tapping Term)
qmkSettings.permissive_hold: パーミッシブホールド (Permissive Hold)
qmkSettings.ignore_mod_tap_interrupt: Mod-Tap 割り込みを無視する
qmkSettings.tapping_force_hold: タッピングフォースホールド (Tapping Force Hold)
qmkSettings.retro_tapping: レトロタッピング (Retro Tapping)
qmkSettings.hold_on_other_key_press: 他のキーが押された時にホールドする
qmkSettings.quick_tap_term: クイックタップ判定時間 (Quick Tap Term)
qmkSettings.tap_hold_caps_delay: Caps Lock タップ/ホールド遅延
qmkSettings.tapping_toggle: タッピングトグル (Tapping Toggle)
qmkSettings.chordal_hold: コーダルホールド (Chordal Hold)
qmkSettings.enable_for_modifiers: モディファイアキーで有効にする
qmkSettings.do_not_auto_shift_special_keys: 特殊キーの自動シフト (Auto Shift) を無効にする
qmkSettings.do_not_auto_shift_numeric_keys: 数字キーの自動シフトを無効にする
qmkSettings.do_not_auto_shift_alpha_characters: アルファベットの自動シフトを無効にする
qmkSettings.enable_keyrepeat: キーリピートを有効にする
qmkSettings.disable_keyrepeat_when_timeout_is_exceed: タイムアウトを超えたらキーリピートを無効にする
qmkSettings.tapping_this_number_of_times_holds_the_k: 指定回数タップすると、もう一度タップするまでホールド状態を維持する
qmkSettings.time_(in_ms)_before_the_one_shot_key_is_: ワンショットキーが自動解除されるまでの待機時間 (ミリ秒)
qmkSettings.delay_between_pressing_a_movement_key_an: 移動キーを押してからマウスカーソルが移動するまでの遅延
qmkSettings.time_between_cursor_movements_in_millise: カーソル移動のステップ間隔 (ミリ秒)
qmkSettings.step_size: ステップサイズ (移動量)
qmkSettings.maximum_cursor_speed_at_which_accelerati: 加速が停止する最大カーソル速度
qmkSettings.time_until_maximum_cursor_speed_is_reach: 最大カーソル速度に達するまでの時間
qmkSettings.delay_between_pressing_a_wheel_key_and_w: ホイールキーを押してからホイールがスクロールするまでの遅延
qmkSettings.time_between_wheel_movements: ホイール移動のステップ間隔
qmkSettings.maximum_number_of_scroll_steps_per_scrol: 1回のスクロールアクションあたりの最大ステップ数
qmkSettings.time_until_maximum_scroll_speed_is_reach: 最大スクロール速度に達するまでの時間
